meta_title: Open-air cinema for local councils and local authorities
meta_desc: Organise an open-air cinema for your local area: giant screen, all-in-one package or hire. A guaranteed summer hit, easy to set up, free quote.
hero_title: Open-air cinema: the highlight of your town’s summer
hero_desc: An open-air cinema screening brings local residents together like few other events can. Hallucine provides town halls and local authorities with everything they need—from giant screens and turnkey equipment to hire options—to ensure a successful evening, without the hassle of complicated logistics.
tout_desc: Buy for regular use, or hire for a one-off event.
c1_desc: Screen, projector and sound all in one: everything you need for a screening, ready to use, with no technical expertise required.
c2_desc: Just one session over the summer? Hire the equipment for the duration of the event, without tying up your budget.
c3_desc: From the village square to the stadium: from 3 to 24 metres, erected in minutes, without the need for lifting equipment.
c4_desc: Sound systems, ballast, covers: everything you need for a large outdoor screen.
how_title: A summer programme in four stages
s1_desc: Depending on the space available, the expected audience and the council’s budget.
s2_desc: A clear, detailed quote, tailored to local authority procedures, within 24 hours.
s3_desc: Quick inflation using a blower, without the need for a crane. Your technical staff can handle the installation.
s4_desc: Set it up, then pack it away in a matter of minutes. Store it compactly until next time.
q1: How do I organise an open-air cinema in my local area?
a1: Three key elements: the equipment (screen, projector, sound system – which we provide), the film’s screening rights (via a distributor or specialist company), and permission to use public space (your local council’s authorisation). As for the equipment, we’ll provide a fully fitted-out package.
q2: Will a crane or heavy machinery be required?
a2: No. Our inflatable screens can be erected in the wind tunnel in a matter of minutes, without the need for lifting equipment. Your technical staff can handle the installation themselves.
q3: Should a local council buy or rent?
a3: If you plan to hold several sessions a year, the cost of buying the equipment will pay for itself quickly. For a one-off event, hiring is the better option. We’ll advise you based on your schedule.
q4: Do you provide quotes that comply with public procurement regulations?
a4: Yes: our quotes are detailed and tailored to local authority procedures. Please send us your specifications and we’ll work to them.
cta_desc: Village square, park, stadium: tell us about your project and we’ll provide you with a free quote.
